title: Blank page issue with Google Sheet node and WebHook
symptom: After linking a Google Sheet to a WebHook, the page appears blank when the WebHook responds. Removing the Google Sheet resolves the issue.
root_cause: The issue arises from the configuration of the Google Sheet node, particularly the 'On Error' setting and potential whitespace in expressions. Incorrect error handling can lead to unhandled errors, causing the workflow to fail silently.
fix_steps: Open the Google Sheet node settings
Remove or adjust the 'On Error' configuration
Check for and remove any extra whitespace in expressions
Save the workflow and test the WebHook again
agent_instruction: Adjust the Google Sheet node settings to fix the error handling and whitespace issues.
